mshamba_frontend.build: cd src/mshamba_frontend && npm install && npm run build

farm1_ledger.init_arg: (variant { Init = record { token_symbol = "FARM1"; token_name = "Farm One Token"; decimals = opt 8; minting_account = record { owner = principal "nebfo-nlhqi-oqa3e-kgpja-bmkud-iymq2-aqnjc-wfigz-hclu6-npvgz-tqe"; subaccount = null }; transfer_fee = 10_000; metadata = vec { record { "project:name"; variant { Text = "Farm One" } }; record { "project:location"; variant { Text = "Kenya" } }; record { "project:crop"; variant { Text = "Maize" } }; record { "project:land_size"; variant { Text = "50 acres" } }; record { "project:url"; variant { Text = "https://mshamba.example" } } }; initial_balances = vec { record { record { owner = principal "nebfo-nlhqi-oqa3e-kgpja-bmkud-iymq2-aqnjc-wfigz-hclu6-npvgz-tqe"; subaccount = null }; 10_000_000_000_000 }; record { record { owner = principal "3omof-dkyww-5w2ny-zwe34-34jni-fw6dp-3prqm-lxqw2-usspd-65vov-mqe"; subaccount = null }; 100_000_000_000_000 } }; archive_options = record { num_blocks_to_archive = 10_000; trigger_threshold = 20_000; controller_id = principal "nebfo-nlhqi-oqa3e-kgpja-bmkud-iymq2-aqnjc-wfigz-hclu6-npvgz-tqe"; cycles_for_archive_creation = opt 4_000_000_000_000 } } })
